Tests for analytics event handling and heartbeat functionality, and a build script for analytics services.


## Files
- **[test_analytics_event.c](test_analytics_event.c.md)**: Tests for analytics event handling, including app crash scenarios, in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_analytics_heartbeat.c](test_analytics_heartbeat.c.md)**: Tests for the analytics heartbeat functionality, including data integrity and overflow handling.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing analytics services in the Pebble firmware.
